title: Per-generation "Run locally" override toggle (remote mode)
description: Per-gen 'Run locally' toggle in PromptBox, shown only while remote-connected; ON routes one Cue/Q dispatch to local ComfyUI, rest of UI stays remote. Local model-presence guard + Cue local/remote badge + multi-stage staging. Narrowed from full two-engine hybrid (deferred). See plan.md.
